narrative:
Miamisburg 1-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,087 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
